news.title: Nepal Launches New Earthquake Preparedness Initiative Following Recent Tremors
news.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 10: Government announces comprehensive earthquake preparedness program after series of tremors across the country.
news.description: Kathmandu, Nov 10: The Nepal government has launched a nationwide earthquake preparedness initiative following a series of moderate tremors that shook various parts of the country last week. The program includes early warning systems, community training, and infrastructure assessment. Prime Minister announced additional funding for earthquake-resistant construction and emergency response capabilities.
news.summary: Nepal government launches comprehensive earthquake preparedness program following recent seismic activity across the nation.

news.title: भूकम्प पूर्वतयारी कार्यक्रम सुरु, सरकारले थाल्यो नयाँ योजना
news.lead: काठमाडौं, कार्तिक २५ - हालैका भूकम्पीय गतिविधिपछि सरकारले राष्ट्रव्यापी भूकम्प पूर्वतयारी कार्यक्रम सुरु गरेको छ।
news.description: काठमाडौं, कार्तिक २५ - हालैका भूकम्पीय गतिविधिपछि सरकारले राष्ट्रव्यापी भूकम्प पूर्वतयारी कार्यक्रम सुरु गरेको छ। यो कार्यक्रममा पूर्व चेतावनी प्रणाली, सामुदायिक तालिम र पूर्वाधार मूल्यांकन समावेश छ।
news.summary: सरकारले राष्ट्रव्यापी भूकम्प पूर्वतयारी कार्यक्रम शुरु गरेको छ।

news.title: Government rolls out earthquake preparedness campaign
news.lead: KATHMANDU - Following recent seismic activities, the government has initiated a comprehensive earthquake preparedness program nationwide.
news.description: KATHMANDU - Following recent seismic activities, the government has initiated a comprehensive earthquake preparedness program nationwide. The initiative focuses on strengthening early warning systems and enhancing community resilience against future earthquakes.
news.summary: Government initiates comprehensive earthquake preparedness program following recent seismic activities.

news.title: Nepal's Tourism Industry Shows Strong Recovery Signs Post-Pandemic
news.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 9: Tourist arrivals increase by 45% compared to last year, signaling robust recovery in Nepal's tourism sector.
news.description: Kathmandu, Nov 9: Nepal's tourism industry is showing remarkable recovery with tourist arrivals increasing by 45% compared to the same period last year. The Nepal Tourism Board reports that both domestic and international tourism have exceeded pre-pandemic projections. Mountain climbing, trekking, and cultural tours are leading the recovery with strong bookings for the upcoming peak season.
news.summary: Nepal's tourism sector demonstrates strong recovery with 45% increase in tourist arrivals compared to previous year.

news.title: Tourism bounces back with 45% growth in arrivals
news.lead: The tourism sector is witnessing unprecedented recovery with international arrivals surging by 45 percent compared to last year.
news.description: The tourism sector is witnessing unprecedented recovery with international arrivals surging by 45 percent compared to last year. Mountain climbing, trekking, and cultural tours are leading the recovery with strong bookings for the upcoming peak season.
news.summary: Tourism industry stakeholders report significant improvement with visitor numbers exceeding pre-pandemic levels.

news.title: Nepal tourism sees remarkable post-pandemic recovery
news.lead: KATHMANDU - Tourism industry stakeholders report significant improvement with visitor numbers exceeding pre-pandemic levels.
news.description: KATHMANDU - Tourism industry stakeholders report significant improvement with visitor numbers exceeding pre-pandemic levels. The recovery has been driven by strong domestic tourism and increasing international arrivals.
news.summary: Tourism industry reports remarkable post-pandemic recovery with visitor numbers exceeding expectations.

news.title: Nepal's Tech Sector Embraces AI Revolution with New Innovation Hub
news.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 8: New AI innovation hub established to support local tech startups and promote artificial intelligence adoption.
news.description: Kathmandu, Nov 8: Nepal has opened its first dedicated AI innovation hub in the capital, marking a significant milestone in the country's technological advancement. The facility will provide resources, training, and support for local tech startups focusing on artificial intelligence solutions. Government officials emphasize the importance of AI in driving economic growth and digital transformation across various sectors.
news.summary: Nepal establishes first AI innovation hub to support tech startups and promote artificial intelligence adoption nationwide.

news.title: एआई इनोभेसन हब स्थापना, प्रविधि क्षेत्रमा नयाँ युग
news.lead: काठमाडौंमा पहिलो कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता केन्द्र स्थापना भएसँगै नेपालको प्रविधि क्षेत्रमा नयाँ अध्याय सुरु भएको छ।
news.description: काठमाडौंमा पहिलो कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता केन्द्र स्थापना भएसँगै नेपालको प्रविधि क्षेत्रमा नयाँ अध्याय सुरु भएको छ। यो केन्द्रले स्थानीय प्रविधि स्टार्टअपहरूलाई सहयोग गर्नेछ।
news.summary: काठमाडौंमा पहिलो एआई केन्द्र स्थापना भएको छ।

news.title: Nepal opens first artificial intelligence innovation centre
news.lead: A new AI innovation hub has been inaugurated in Kathmandu to foster technological advancement and support startups.
news.description: A new AI innovation hub has been inaugurated in Kathmandu to foster technological advancement and support startups. The facility is expected to become a catalyst for Nepal's digital transformation journey.
news.summary: New AI innovation hub inaugurated in Kathmandu to foster technological advancement and support startups.

news.title: Nepal Achieves 95% Renewable Energy Target Ahead of Schedule
news.lead: Kathmandu, Nov 7: Country surpasses renewable energy goals with hydropower and solar installations exceeding expectations.
news.description: Nepal has achieved 95% renewable energy generation, surpassing its national target three years ahead of schedule. The milestone was reached through significant investments in hydropower projects and solar installations across rural areas. Energy Minister credited public-private partnerships and international support for the remarkable achievement in sustainable energy transition.
news.summary: Nepal reaches 95% renewable energy generation, achieving national targets three years ahead of planned timeline.

news.title: नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको लक्ष्य समयअघि नै हासिल
news.lead: नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको ९५ प्रतिशत लक्ष्य तोकिएको समयभन्दा तीन वर्ष पहिले नै हासिल गरेको छ।
news.description: नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको ९५ प्रतिशत लक्ष्य तोकिएको समयभन्दा तीन वर्ष पहिले नै हासिल गरेको छ। जल विद्युत र सौर्य ऊर्जामा गरिएको लगानीले यो उपलब्धि सम्भव भएको हो।
news.summary: नेपालले नवीकरणीय ऊर्जाको लक्ष्य समयअघि नै पूरा गरेको छ।

news.title: Nepal hits renewable energy target three years early
news.lead: The country has achieved its ambitious renewable energy goal of 95 percent generation ahead of the 2028 deadline.
news.description: The country has achieved its ambitious renewable energy goal of 95 percent generation ahead of the 2028 deadline. This success is attributed to strategic investments in hydropower and solar energy infrastructure.
news.summary: Nepal achieves ambitious renewable energy goal of 95% generation three years ahead of deadline.
